misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: Hailing from Hirsala Golf, Miso is a seasoned participant in the Hector Trophée, having graced the fairways of this unique annual competition on ten separate occasions. His consistent presence over the years has firmly established him as a dedicated figure within the tournament's evolving narrative.

Throughout his dedicated involvement, Miso has proven his capability within the team format, securing the coveted Hector Trophée with his partner once. This significant triumph underscores his collaborative skill and ability to perform under pressure in the pair setting. However, the prestigious Victor Trophy, awarded to the top individual player, has not yet found a place in his collection, an achievement that continues to define a key objective.

Miso’s profound appreciation for the intricate craftsmanship of golf is distinctly evident in his choice of equipment; he is well-known for his unwavering preference for Miura irons. His dedication to these precisely engineered clubs is so notable that it has inspired anecdotal whispers of him even sleeping with them, a playful yet telling testament to his deep-seated connection to the finest tools of the game and his meticulous approach to his craft. While Miso will not be among the competitors for the Hector Trophée 2026, his sustained involvement in Hector events suggests that his pursuit of further golfing distinction is far from over, promising a potential return to the fairways in future editions.
